Influenza Inhibitor (HeLa, fluorescence).note: HeLa cells tolerate 0.5-1% but fluorescence artifacts >0.3%. Recommend ≤0.2% for clean GFP readout.

Influenza Inhibitor (Vero, CPE).note: Vero cells more tolerant. CPE assay less sensitive to DMSO. ≤0.5% maintains normal morphology.

Cell Viability (MTT/CCK-8).note: DMSO interferes with metabolic assays. Keep as low as possible.

Primary Neurons.note: Primary neurons VERY sensitive to DMSO. Recommend <0.05%. Consider alternative solvents.
